# Test Fixtures

This directory contains test fixtures for mul-agent.

## Structure

- `child-process-bridge/` - Child process bridge test fixtures
- `exec-allowlist-shell-parser-parity.json` - Exec allowlist test data
- `hooks-install/` - Git hooks installation fixtures
- `plugins-install/` - Plugin installation fixtures
- `system-run-approval-*.json` - System run approval test contracts
